revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月15日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[関ヶ原の戦い]] * 慶長18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1613年]][[10月28日]]） - [[支倉常長]]ら[[仙台藩]]の[[慶長遣欧使節]]が日本を出発。 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[10月18日]]） - [[田沼意次]]が[[小姓組|小姓組番頭]]格となる。 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[10月17日]]） - [[大船建造の禁]]が廃止され、およそ250年ぶりに大型船の建造が可能となる
== 誕生日 == * [[建炎]]4年<!-- 南宋 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1130年]][[10月18日]]） - [[朱子]]、[[朱子学]]の祖（+ [[1200年]]） * [[貞享]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1685年]][[10月12日]]） - [[石田梅岩]]、[[思想家]]（+ [[1744年]]） * [[寛政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[10月15日]]） - [[伊達斉宗]]、第10代[[仙台藩]]主（+ [[1819年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[10月26日]]） - [[岩倉具視]]、[[政治家]]・[[明治維新]]の元勲（+ [[1883年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[10月30日]]） - [[大森房吉]]、[[地球科学者]]（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[10月27日]]） - [[覚猷|鳥羽僧正覚猷]]、[[天台宗]]の高僧。伝『[[鳥獣人物戯画]]』作者。 * [[嘉元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1305年]][[10月4日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（* [[1249年]]） * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579年]][[10月5日]]） - [[松平信康]]<ref>{{Harvnb|谷口克広|2007|pp=203-211}}</ref>、[[徳川家康]]の嫡男（* [[1559年]]） * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[大谷吉継]]、[[武将]] * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[平塚為広]]、[[武将]] * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[島清興]]、[[武将]] * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[戸田勝成]]、[[武将]] * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年10月21日） - [[肝付兼護]]、[[武将]]（* [[1561年]]） * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年10月21日） - [[島津豊久]]、[[武将]]（* [[1570年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月15日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[関ヶ原の戦い]] * 慶長18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1613年]][[10月28日]]） - [[支倉常長]]ら[[仙台藩]]の[[慶長遣欧使節]]が日本を出発。 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[10月18日]]） - [[田沼意次]]が[[小姓組|小姓組番頭]]格となる。 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[10月17日]]） - [[大船建造の禁]]が廃止され、およそ250年ぶりに大型船の建造が可能となる
== 誕生日 == * [[建炎]]4年<!-- 南宋 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[1130年]][[10月18日]]） - [[朱子]]、[[朱子学]]の祖（+ [[1200年]]） * [[貞享]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1685年]][[10月12日]]） - [[石田梅岩]]、[[思想家]]（+ [[1744年]]） * [[寛政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[10月15日]]） - [[伊達斉宗]]、第10代[[仙台藩]]主（+ [[1819年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[10月26日]]） - [[岩倉具視]]、[[政治家]]・[[明治維新]]の元勲（+ [[1883年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[10月30日]]） - [[大森房吉]]、[[地球科学者]]（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[10月27日]]） - [[覚猷|鳥羽僧正覚猷]]、[[天台宗]]の高僧。伝『[[鳥獣人物戯画]]』作者。 * [[嘉元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1305年]][[10月4日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（* [[1249年]]） * [[天正]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1579年]][[10月5日]]） - [[松平信康]]<ref>{{Harvnb|谷口克広|2007|pp=203-211}}</ref>、[[徳川家康]]の嫡男（* [[1559年]]） * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[大谷吉継]]、[[武将]] * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[平塚為広]]、[[武将]] * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[島清興]]、[[武将]] * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月21日]]） - [[戸田勝成]]、[[武将]] * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年10月21日） - [[肝付兼護]]、[[武将]]（* [[1561年]]） * 慶長5年（グレゴリオ暦1600年10月21日） - [[島津豊久]]、[[武将]]（* [[1570年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
adding these as a part 1 of a few steps to get names on the things
Text replacement - "関連項目" to "See Also"
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Moving from [[Category:大安]] to [[Category:Taian]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Text replacement - "== 脚注 ==↵{{脚注ヘルプ}}↵{{Reflist}}" to ""
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
adding korean to all the dates

revision.text:
[[sn:September 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}}. Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|慶長遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}}) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}}, founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}}). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}}, philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}}). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}}) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}}, 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}}, politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}}, geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}}, also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}}, high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}}. * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}}, 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}}). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}}, eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}}). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}}, military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}}, military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}}, military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}}, military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}}, military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}}, military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}

Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .

[[sn:September 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|qq30|ja|qq30年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|qq40|ja|qq40年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|qq40|ja|qq40年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽僧正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}

[[Category:New]] [[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:11]][[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613年}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744年}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883年}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305年}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130年}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200年}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140年}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249年}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year }} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} ).

[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year }} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year }} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year }} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} ).

revision.text:
[[sn:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] [[zh:九月十五]] [[en:draft:September 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year }} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year }} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}

== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year }} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year }} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い}} . revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次|12=draft}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=draft}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=draft}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗|12=draft}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉|12=draft}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷|12=draft}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=draft}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗|12=draft}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇|12=draft}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康|12=draft}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915}}

{{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久|12=draft}} , military commander (* [[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次|12=draft}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=draft}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=draft}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗|12=draft}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉|12=draft}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷|12=draft}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=draft}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗|12=draft}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇|12=draft}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康|12=draft}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft}} ).

{{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian
