revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次|12=draft}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=draft}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=draft}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗|12=draft}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉|12=draft}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷|12=draft}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=draft}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗|12=draft}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇|12=draft}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康|12=draft}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長|12=draft|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=draft|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次|12=draft|12=draft}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=draft|12=draft}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=draft|12=draft}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft|12=draft}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft|12=draft}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉|12=draft|12=draft}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft|12=draft}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft|12=draft}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉|12=draft|12=draft}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷|12=draft|12=draft}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=draft|12=draft}} , high-ranking monk of the {{ill|Tendai school|ja|天台宗|12=draft|12=draft}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|ja|鳥獣人物戯画|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kagen|ja|嘉元|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|ja|1305th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|ja|亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|ja|1249th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康|12=draft|12=draft}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|ja|大谷吉継|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shima Kiyooki|ja|島清興|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsunari|ja|戸田勝成|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十五]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1130|ja|1130th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|ja|朱子学|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1200|ja|1200th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|ja|1685th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft|12=draft}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|ja|1744th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|ja|1796年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|ja|伊達斉宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft|12=draft}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1883|ja|1883rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōmori Fusakichi|ja|大森房吉|12=draft|12=draft}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|ja|保延|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|ja|1140th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kakuyū|ja|覚猷|12=draft|12=draft}} , Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|ja|松平信康|12=draft|12=draft}} , eldest son of , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Toda Toyohisa|ja|島津豊久|12=draft|12=draft}} , military commander (* {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|ja|関ヶ原の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|ja|1613rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|ja|支倉常長|12=draft|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=draft|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|ja|田沼意次|12=draft|12=draft}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=draft|12=draft}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|ja|1853rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=draft|12=draft}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|qq=}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|qq=}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|qq=}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|qq=}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|qq=}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840070]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|qq=}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|qq=}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|qq=}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|qq=}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|qq=}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|14|9|16|8|15|10|9|0915|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|qq=|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|qq=|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|qq=|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|qq=|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.

Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840070]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|qq=|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|qq=|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|qq=|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).

Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|qq=|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|qq=|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|qq=|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|qq=|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|qq=|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|qq=|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|qq=|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十五]][[zh:九月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840070]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十五]][[zh:九月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840070]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . == Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十五]][[zh:九月十五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840070]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]] . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 18 (Gregorian [[:en:1613|1613]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – [[:en:Hasekura Tsunenaga|Hasekura Tsunenaga]] and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Tanuma Okitsugu|Tanuma Okitsugu]] is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1130|1130]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of [[:en:Cheng–Zhu school|Neo-Confucianism]] (+ [[:en:1200|1200]] ). * [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , philosopher (+ [[:en:1744|1744]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – [[:en:Date Narimune|Date Narimune]] , 10th lord of [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]] (+ [[:en:1819|1819]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8 (Gregorian [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakura Tomomi]] , politician and key figure of the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]] (+ [[:en:1883|1883]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Fusakichi Omori|Ōmori Fusakichi]] , geoscientist (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).
