== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōen|Hōen]] 6 (Julian [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ) – [[:en:Toba Sōjō|Kakuyū]] , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the [[:en:Tiantai|Tendai school]] and purported creator of the [[:en:Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga]] . * [[:en:Kagen|Kagen]] 3 (Julian [[:en:1305|1305]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Emperor Kameyama]] , 90th Emperor of Japan (* [[:en:1249|1249]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 7 (Julian [[:en:1579|1579]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ) – [[:en:Matsudaira Nobuyasu|Matsudaira Nobuyasu]] , eldest son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (* [[:en:1559|1559]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Ōtani Yoshitsugu|Ōtani Yoshitsugu]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shima Sakon|Shima Kiyooki]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Toda Katsushige|Toda Katsunari]] , military commander. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ) – [[:en:Shimazu Toyohisa|Shimazu Toyohisa]] , military commander (* [[:en:1570|1570]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|en|Battle of Sekigahara|WD=Q234188|lt=Battle of Sekigahara}} . <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十五]][[zh:九月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十五]][[zh:九月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十五]][[zh:九月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 15|qq=September 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|en|Battle of Sekigahara|WD=Q234188|lt=Battle of Sekigahara}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|en|1613|WD=Q6776|lt=1613}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|en|Hasekura Tsunenaga|WD=Q244764|lt=Hasekura Tsunenaga}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|WD=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1130|en|1130|WD=Q19562|lt=1130}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of {{ill|Cheng–Zhu school|en|Cheng–Zhu school|WD=Q841735|lt=Neo-Confucianism}} (+ {{ill|1200|en|1200|WD=Q5224|lt=1200}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|en|Ishida Baigan|WD=Q1319454|lt=Ishida Baigan}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744}} ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|WD=Q2919|lt=October 15}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|en|Date Narimune|WD=Q5227540|lt=Date Narimune}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain}} (+ {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|en|1825|WD=Q6997|lt=1825}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|en|Iwakura Tomomi|WD=Q428200|lt=Iwakura Tomomi}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|WD=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration}} (+ {{ill|1883|en|1883|WD=Q7816|lt=1883}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Fusakichi Omori|en|Fusakichi Omori|WD=Q1632448|lt=Ōmori Fusakichi}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|WD=Q1193929|lt=Hōen}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|en|1140|WD=Q19611|lt=1140}} {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} ) – {{ill|Toba Sōjō|en|Toba Sōjō|WD=Q3076602|lt=Kakuyū}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the {{ill|Tiantai|en|Tiantai|WD=Q668188|lt=Tendai school}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|en|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|WD=Q736832|lt=Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga}} . * {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|WD=Q1327409|lt=Kagen}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|en|1305|WD=Q5624|lt=1305}} {{ill|October 4|en|October 4|WD=Q2929|lt=October 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|en|Emperor Kameyama|WD=Q360972|lt=Emperor Kameyama}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|en|1249|WD=Q5485|lt=1249}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|WD=Q2930|lt=October 5}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|en|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|WD=Q1188704|lt=Matsudaira Nobuyasu}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (* {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|en|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|WD=Q386265|lt=Ōtani Yoshitsugu}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Hiratsuka Tamehiro|ja|平塚為広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiratsuka Tamehiro|1=Hiratsuka Tamehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11060811}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Shima Sakon|en|Shima Sakon|WD=Q1926883|lt=Shima Kiyooki}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsushige|en|Toda Katsushige|WD=Q1067605|lt=Toda Katsunari}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Kimotsuki Kanemori|ja|肝付兼護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimotsuki Kanemori|1=Kimotsuki Kanemori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11611483}} , military commander (* {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Toyohisa|en|Shimazu Toyohisa|WD=Q1133872|lt=Shimazu Toyohisa}} , military commander (* {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21|1=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|en|Battle of Sekigahara|WD=Q234188|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|1=Battle of Sekigahara}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|en|1613|WD=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28|1=October 28}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|en|Hasekura Tsunenaga|WD=Q244764|lt=Hasekura Tsunenaga|1=Hasekura Tsunenaga}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747|1=1747}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18|1=October 18}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|WD=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu|1=Tanuma Okitsugu}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17|1=October 17}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
== Births == * {{ill|Ken’ei|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken’ei|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1130|en|1130|WD=Q19562|lt=1130|1=1130}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18|1=October 18}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Xi|ja|朱子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhu Xi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朱熹|1=Zhu Xi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9397}} , founder of {{ill|Cheng–Zhu school|en|Cheng–Zhu school|WD=Q841735|lt=Neo-Confucianism|1=Cheng–Zhu school}} (+ {{ill|1200|en|1200|WD=Q5224|lt=1200|1=1200}} ). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|en|Ishida Baigan|WD=Q1319454|lt=Ishida Baigan|1=Ishida Baigan}} , philosopher (+ {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744|1=1744}} ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|WD=Q2919|lt=October 15|1=October 15}} ) – {{ill|Date Narimune|en|Date Narimune|WD=Q5227540|lt=Date Narimune|1=Date Narimune}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} (+ {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819|1=1819}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1825|en|1825|WD=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|en|Iwakura Tomomi|WD=Q428200|lt=Iwakura Tomomi|1=Iwakura Tomomi}} , politician and key figure of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|WD=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration|1=Meiji Restoration}} (+ {{ill|1883|en|1883|WD=Q7816|lt=1883|1=1883}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30|1=October 30}} ) – {{ill|Fusakichi Omori|en|Fusakichi Omori|WD=Q1632448|lt=Ōmori Fusakichi|1=Fusakichi Omori}} , geoscientist (+ {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|WD=Q1193929|lt=Hōen|1=Hōen}} 6 (Julian {{ill|1140|en|1140|WD=Q19611|lt=1140|1=1140}} {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27|1=October 27}} ) – {{ill|Toba Sōjō|en|Toba Sōjō|WD=Q3076602|lt=Kakuyū|1=Toba Sōjō}} , also known as {{ill|Toba Sōjō|ja|鳥羽Monk正覚猷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Sōjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , high-Ranking monk of the {{ill|Tiantai|en|Tiantai|WD=Q668188|lt=Tendai school|1=Tiantai}} and purported creator of the {{ill|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|en|Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|WD=Q736832|lt=Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga|1=Chōjū-jinbutsu-giga}} . * {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|WD=Q1327409|lt=Kagen|1=Kagen}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1305|en|1305|WD=Q5624|lt=1305|1=1305}} {{ill|October 4|en|October 4|WD=Q2929|lt=October 4|1=October 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|en|Emperor Kameyama|WD=Q360972|lt=Emperor Kameyama|1=Emperor Kameyama}} , 90th Emperor of Japan (* {{ill|1249|en|1249|WD=Q5485|lt=1249|1=1249}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 7 (Julian {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579|1=1579}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|WD=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|en|Matsudaira Nobuyasu|WD=Q1188704|lt=Matsudaira Nobuyasu|1=Matsudaira Nobuyasu}} , eldest son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (* {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21|1=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|en|Ōtani Yoshitsugu|WD=Q386265|lt=Ōtani Yoshitsugu|1=Ōtani Yoshitsugu}} , military commander. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21|1=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Shima {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21|1=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Toda Katsushige|en|Toda Katsushige|WD=Q1067605|lt=Toda Katsunari|1=Toda military commander (* {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21|1=October 21}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|en|Battle of Sekigahara|WD=Q234188|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|1=Battle of Sekigahara}} . Leads to the deaths of many people listed in [[#Deaths]] * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1613|en|1613|WD=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28|1=October 28}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|en|Hasekura Tsunenaga|WD=Q244764|lt=Hasekura Tsunenaga|1=Hasekura Tsunenaga}} and the {{ill|Keichō Embassy|ja|Keichō遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Embassy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} depart from Japan. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747|1=1747}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18|1=October 18}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|WD=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu|1=Tanuma Okitsugu}} is appointed {{ill|Koshōgumi|ja|小姓組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshōgumi|1=Koshō-gumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459591}} commander. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17|1=October 17}} ) – The {{ill|Ban on Large Shipbuilding|ja|大船建造の禁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban on Large Shipbuilding|1=prohibition of the construction of large ships|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11438620}} is lifted, allowing large ship construction for the first time in approximately 250 years.
